title: Turkish Tea Glasses for 6 People, 130 ml (4.5oz), Elegant Tea Set, Traditional Arabic Persian Tea Cups, Istikan, Ince Belli Cay Bardagi, Tazas de te, Cultural Gift by Pasabahce
features: AUTHENTIC TURKISH TEA GLASSES SET - 6 traditional waisted (ince belli) tea glasses, 130ml capacity. Perfect for Turkish çay, Arabic tea (istikan), Persian tea, and Middle Eastern hospitality traditions. Trusted Pasabahce quality.

IDEAL FOR ESPRESSO & COFFEE - Perfect 130ml size for espresso, ristretto, double espresso, cortado service. Heat-resistant clear glass showcases crema beautifully. Popular in UK cafés and homes for Mediterranean-style coffee presentation

PREMIUM PASABAHCE QUALITY - Turkey's most trusted glassware brand since 1935. High-quality food-safe clear glass maintains crystal clarity without clouding, staining, or discolouration even after years of daily use

HEAT RESISTANT & DURABLE - Safely handles boiling water to cold beverages without cracking. Withstands sudden temperature changes. Built for commercial durability and long-lasting home use. Will not darken over time

VERSATILE MULTI-PURPOSE GLASSES - Perfect for herbal infusions, mint tea, fruit juice shots, small cold drinks, wine tasting, smoothie samples. Watch tea steep through transparent glass. Suitable for hot and cold beverages

STUNNING DESSERT PRESENTATION - Exceptionally popular in UK hospitality for layered desserts. Create beautiful panna cotta, mousse, tiramisu, trifle layers, chia pudding, mini cheesecakes. Clear glass showcases colourful layers brilliantly

ERGONOMIC TRADITIONAL DESIGN - Classic tulip shape (9cm height, 6cm rim) provides comfortable burn-free grip. Showcases tea's rich colour whilst keeping perfect temperature. Elegant yet practical for everyday use

HOME & COMMERCIAL USE - Ideal for families, entertaining, replacing broken glasses. Trusted by Turkish restaurants, Middle Eastern cafés, hotels, dessert parlours, tearooms. Professional quality at accessible pricing

CULTURAL HERITAGE GIFT - Thoughtful present for weddings, housewarmings, Eid, Ramadan, birthdays. Perfect for Turkish, Arabic, Persian communities or anyone appreciating authentic Mediterranean tableware and tea culture

DISHWASHER SAFE & EASY CLEAN - Effortless maintenance whilst maintaining pristine clarity. Smooth non-porous surface prevents odour absorption and staining. Stackable design saves cabinet space in homes and commercial kitchens
description: Turkish Tea Glasses Set of 6 by Pasabahce – 130ml Traditional Waisted Glass Cups Experience traditional tea culture with this Pasabahce Vefa Turkish tea glasses set . This 6-piece set features the classic ince belli (waisted) design , widely used for tea service in Turkish, Middle Eastern, and Mediterranean households. Each glass has a 130ml (4.5oz) capacity , suitable for everyday use and special occasions. Traditional Tea Serving The tulip-shaped waisted form highlights the tea’s rich colour while offering a comfortable grip. Suitable for Turkish tea, Arabic tea (istikan), Persian tea, and other traditional hot beverages. The 9cm height and 6cm rim diameter provide balanced handling for hot drinks. Espresso and Coffee Use These glasses are also suitable for serving espresso, ristretto, and other short coffee drinks. The clear, heat-resistant glass allows visual appreciation of coffee crema and is suitable for home or café use. Dessert and Presentation Use Commonly used for small dessert servings such as layered desserts, mousse, panna cotta, fruit parfaits, and similar presentations. The transparent glass highlights layered textures and colours, making it suitable for home entertaining and hospitality settings. Herbal and Infusion Drinks Ideal for herbal infusions including mint tea, chamomile, ginger and lemon, fennel, and fruit infusions. The clear glass allows easy monitoring of steeping and colour development. Quality Glass Construction Manufactured by Pasabahce , these glasses are made from food-safe clear glass designed for daily use. The non-porous surface helps maintain clarity and resists staining. Suitable for hot and cold beverages. Easy Care and Practical Design Dishwasher safe for convenient cleaning. Stackable shape supports space-saving storage in cabinets. Suitable for both home and commercial environments. Product Specifications - Capacity: 130ml (4.5oz) - Height: 9cm - Rim diameter: 6cm - Weight: approx. 96g per glass - Material: Clear glass - Set includes: 6 tea glasses - Dishwasher safe - Heat resistant Inspired by traditional tea culture, this Pasabahce Vefa tea glass set is suitable for tea, espresso, desserts, and everyday beverage service.
